alerts.bottle: Franklin ABC Board official release-watch page
alerts.source: NC board release watch - Franklin ABC Board
alerts.inventorySemantics: NC is fragmented by local ABC boards. Wake can expose store-level inventory, NC Stock Shipped Data gives board-level shipment evidence, and the NC warehouse page is statewide early-warning radar. Board/warehouse signals are useful planning intelligence but must not be described as exact shelf inventory.
alerts.reason: New board_county nc_board_release_surface signal for Franklin ABC Board official release-watch page in NC.
alerts.evidence: Franklin ABC Board exposes an official release-watch page at https://www.franklinncabc.com/. Bourbon Signal treats this as a release-watch source surface; users should verify current rules and dates at the source.

alerts.inventorySemantics: Tennessee ABC official public surfaces expose public information/forms and license lists for a private retail market. Treat as source-discovery/license intelligence only; do not produce bottle/store alerts from these sources.

alerts.source: Kahn's Fine Wines & Spirits in-stock bourbon API
alerts.inventorySemantics: Indiana is a private retail market. ATC permit rows identify active package-store locations but are not bottle inventory. Retailer shop endpoints/pages such as CityHive can produce store-level bottle inventory/watch signals, with a verify-before-driving caveat.
alerts.reason: Previously seen signal for unknown bottle in IN is absent from current run.
